            || '.'

(SELECT substr(b.ds_branch,1,250) FROM MW_BRANCHES b WHERE b.nr_sequencia = a.nr_seq_branch)

(SELECT
  (SELECT LISTAGG(
    CASE
      WHEN mp.ie_version_type = 'V'
      THEN
        CASE
          WHEN mp.all_sps_version = 'S'
          THEN MV.DS_VERSION
            || '.'
            || MV.DS_SERVICE_PACK
            || '+'
          ELSE MV.DS_VERSION
            || '.'
            || MV.DS_SERVICE_PACK
        END
      ELSE
        CASE
          WHEN mp.selected_upper_version = 'S'
          THEN MV.DS_VERSION
            || '+'
          ELSE MV.DS_VERSION
        END
    END, ' | ' ) WITHIN GROUP (
  ORDER BY DS_VERSION, DS_SERVICE_PACK) AS versoes
  FROM MW_PACKAGE_VERSION MV
  WHERE MV.NR_SEQ_PACKAGE = mp.nr_sequencia
  ) AS DS_COMPATIBLE_VERSION
FROM MW_PACKAGE mp
WHERE mp.NR_SEQUENCIA = a.nr_sequencia)

      WHEN mp.ie_version_type = 'V'
      THEN
        CASE
          WHEN mp.all_sps_version = 'S'
          THEN MV.DS_VERSION
            || '.'
            || MV.DS_SERVICE_PACK
            || '+'
          ELSE MV.DS_VERSION
            || '.'
            || MV.DS_SERVICE_PACK
        END
      ELSE
        CASE
          WHEN mp.selected_upper_version = 'S'
          THEN MV.DS_VERSION
            || '+'
          ELSE MV.DS_VERSION
        END
    END, ' | ' ) WITHIN GROUP (
  ORDER BY DS_VERSION, DS_SERVICE_PACK) AS versoes
  FROM MW_PACKAGE_VERSION MV
  WHERE MV.NR_SEQ_PACKAGE = mp.nr_sequencia
  ) AS DS_COMPATIBLE_VERSION
FROM MW_PACKAGE mp
WHERE mp.NR_SEQUENCIA = a.nr_sequencia)
(SELECT substr(b.nr_sequencia||' - '||b.DS_DESCRIPTION,1,250) FROM MW_PACKAGE b WHERE b.nr_sequencia = a.nr_seq_parent)
